```ini
keybind = ctrl+alt+k=goto_split:top
keybind = ctrl+alt+l=goto_split:right

# ── Pane resize ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
keybind = ctrl+shift+alt+h=resize_split:left:10
keybind = ctrl+shift+alt+j=resize_split:down:10
keybind = ctrl+shift+alt+k=resize_split:up:10
keybind = ctrl+shift+alt+l=resize_split:right:10

# ── Zoom / close ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
keybind = ctrl+shift+alt+z=toggle_split_zoom
keybind = ctrl+shift+w=close_surface

# ── Tabs ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
keybind = ctrl+shift+t=new_tab
keybind = ctrl+shift+alt+w=close_tab
keybind = ctrl+tab=next_tab
keybind = ctrl+shift+tab=previous_tab

# ── Window ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
keybind = ctrl+shift+n=new_window

# ── Font size ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
keybind = ctrl+equal=increase_font_size
keybind = ctrl+minus=decrease_font_size
keybind = ctrl+zero=reset_font_size
```

Notes:
- Ghostty has no leader-key support — pane navigation mapped to `ctrl+alt+hjkl` (clean, rarely conflicts)
- `ctrl+shift+c/v` = copy/paste already Ghostty defaults, no need to add

Now I have everything. On Linux: `mod.SUPER = SHIFT|CTRL`, `mod.SUPER_REV = SHIFT|ALT|CTRL`. Leader = `CTRL+s`.

Key split/pane bindings to map:

| WezTerm | Action |
|---|---|
| `CTRL+s` then `s` | split below |
| `CTRL+s` then `v` | split right |
| `SHIFT+CTRL+\` | split below |
| `SHIFT+ALT+CTRL+\` | split right |
| `LEADER+hjkl` | navigate panes |
| `SHIFT+ALT+CTRL+z` | zoom toggle |
| `SHIFT+CTRL+w` | close pane |
| `SHIFT+ALT+CTRL+w` | close tab |
| `SHIFT+CTRL+t` | new tab |
| `CTRL+Tab` / `CTRL+SHIFT+Tab` | next/prev tab |

Ghostty config (add to `~/.config/ghostty/config`):

```ini
# ── Splits ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
keybind = ctrl+shift+backslash=new_split:down
keybind = ctrl+shift+alt+backslash=new_split:right

# ── Pane navigation (replaces leader+hjkl) ──────────────────────────────────
keybind = ctrl+alt+h=goto_split:left
keybind = ctrl+alt+j=goto_split:bottom
keybind = ctrl+alt+k=goto_split:top
keybind = ctrl+alt+l=goto_split:right

# ── Pane resize ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
keybind = ctrl+shift+alt+h=resize_split:left:10
keybind = ctrl+shift+alt+j=resize_split:down:10
keybind = ctrl+shift+alt+k=resize_split:up:10
keybind = ctrl+shift+alt+l=resize_split:right:10

# ── Zoom / close ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
keybind = ctrl+shift+alt+z=toggle_split_zoom
keybind = ctrl+shift+w=close_surface

# ── Tabs ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
keybind = ctrl+shift+t=new_tab
keybind = ctrl+shift+alt+w=close_tab
keybind = ctrl+tab=next_tab
keybind = ctrl+shift+tab=previous_tab

# ── Window ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
keybind = ctrl+shift+n=new_window

# ── Font size ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
keybind = ctrl+equal=increase_font_size
keybind = ctrl+minus=decrease_font_size
keybind = ctrl+zero=reset_font_size
```

Notes:
- Ghostty has no leader-key support — pane navigation mapped to `ctrl+alt+hjkl` (clean, rarely conflicts)
- `ctrl+shift+c/v` = copy/paste already Ghostty defaults, no need to add
- `goto_split` directions: Ghostty uses `top`/`bottom` not `up`/`down`
- Verify `backslash` spelling — Ghostty uses the literal key name
